"C:\Users\vladi\AppData\Local\Programs\CLion 2025.3.3\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\cLion.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\vladi\AppData\Local\Programs\CLION2~1.3\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\cLion.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\cLion.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\vladi\AppData\Local\Programs\CLION2~1.3\bin\mingw\bin\g++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\cLion.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o mainWIN32.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmainWIN32.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\cLion.dir\linkLibs.rsp
